title: Origins: Tricky Trials Trio
description: Origins based on the crab, armadillo, and penguin mobs that were voted on during the mob vote to be in Minecraft's 1.21 Tricky Trials Update (even though the winner has already been added to the game now)
body:
**REQUIRES THE [ORIGINS MOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) BECAUSE THESE ARE LITERALLY ORIGINS**
**REQUIRES THE [PEHKUI MOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) FOR ANY SIZE CHANGES**

This is a datapack that adds three new origins based around the three mob vote candidates from October 2023. Crabble: the crab origin, Pengui: the penguin origin, and Arma: the armadillo origin. # **Crabble**![pixel art of a crab, based on the version shown in the 2023 minecraft mob vote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a12fdad2e5cb6e2f48d2c8ad734410f2090ade04.png)
### **Impact: 2**
### Icon: Tube Coral

+ Scuttle: Your legs are not built for normal movement. You move faster side to side and when crouched, but slower straight forward or backward.

+ Cartoonishly Noisy: Your sideways movement is too quick, and will still set off sculk sensors when crouched.

     *You can walk quieter with Swift Sneak III

+ Sideways Step: You can climb a couple blocks up before needing to take a rest.

     *Toggle on and off with [Primary]

+ Crabby Claws: Your claws allow you to reach blocks slightly farther away. They are unfortunately useless when reaching further entities.

# **Pengui**![pixel art of a penguin waving, based on the interpretation from the 2023 minecraft mob vote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/855b5feae1c79121e60e9b20e0166932f8d79d01.png)
### **Impact: 2** ### Icon: Tropical Fish
+ Slip: All surfaces are slippery beneath your webbed feet.

+ Slide: With enough speed you can slide from land over the water's surface, but will sink as soon as you stop sprinting.

     *Once you stop sprinting, you will need to touch dry land again to slide on top of water

+ Penguin Build: Your flippers and small size allow you to swim notably faster than a human.
     *-.5 height

     *x2 swim speed

+ Piscivore: You are used to hunting fish, so it is slightly more filling and saturating, but all other food is barely useful to you.

+ Huddle Up: A smaller body means less to keep warm, but your kind will still huddle together for heat and will heal more effectively when very close to others.

# **Arma** ![pixel art of a minecraft armadillo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/070c3977023261000c59f62b2fa8bd99a0a9668f.png)
### Impact: 1
### Icon: Leather
+ Shell Armor: You can curl up by crouching, giving you extra armor points and causing you to fall faster.

     *+6 armor

+ Strike: Quickly roll at enemies, damaging any you hit with more and more power depending on the strength of your armor.

     *Dash forward with [Primary]

+ Armor Gaps: The gaps in your shell are vulnerable, making you much more susceptible to damage when not curled up.

     *+25% damage received when not crouched

+ Favorite Snack: You can eat spider eyes without issue, they're quite tasty. Any wolf friends you share them with will also find them tastier.

+ Hunched Over: Your shell does make you hunch a bit.

     *-15% height


**If you encounter any bugs, you can always find me in the Origins discord @flowersinthedaark (please do ping, my dms are off 90% of the time)**
